behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction mentions bin shim, package.json bin/engines/files updates, AGENTS.md updates, and references wrangler/bin/wrangler.js as the pattern; test-asserted strings like 'requires at least' and version managers (volta/nvm) align with the referenced pattern.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (version check, error message, exit code) without specifying exact code or strings.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for behavioral outputs (non-zero exit, 'requires at least' substring, user version, volta/nvm/fnm) that any reasonable implementation following the wrangler pattern would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute node subprocess against bin/c3.js and inspect actual stderr/exit code behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub bin/c3.js that does nothing would not print 'requires at least' nor the user's version nor suggest a version manager.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Version gate, error message, user version, version manager suggestion, non-zero exit, and AGENTS.md update are all tested (per truncated config_edit tests mentioned).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with clear section comments (fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, config_edit) and descriptive names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at relevant files (package.json, AGENTS.md, wrangler bin) which is expected; doesn't dictate exact lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: AGENTS.md diff is small and localized to overview/structure/build sections.
